description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style parcel locker constructed primarily from dark, weathered metal. The front face features six individual compartment doors, each with horizontal ventilation slats and visible numbering, suggesting secure storage for parcels or personal items. The metal surface is heavily worn, with patches of rust, scratches, and some graffiti, indicating long-term use in an urban environment. The sides and back are solid, with no openings or features except for some additional surface wear and minor dents. The doors are swing-out style, with recessed handles for secure access, and some are shown partially open. There are no visible digital interfaces, branding, or instructional signage on the exterior.
description: A rugged, dark metal parcel locker with six vented compartment doors, showing heavy wear and urban graffiti. The locker is solidly built, with swing-out doors and no visible digital interface or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing six compartment doors with horizontal vents, numbering, and some doors partially open.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid, worn metal panel and the profile of open compartment doors.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned metal back with some surface wear and no openings.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid metal panel and the edge of an open compartment door visible.
attribute_access_door_design: swing-out metal doors with recessed handles and horizontal ventilation slats
